title: WordPress Recovery Mode Email Flow
activity_flow: [NO] → RETURN WP_Error('storage_error', 'Could not update the email last sent time.')
ACTION: switch_to_locale(get_locale()) if locale switcher available → $switched_locale
ACTION: str_replace placeholders with $url, human_time_diff(time()+$rate_limit), $cause, $details, home_url('/'), REQUEST_URI, $support, implode($debug)
ACTION: build $email array (to, subject, message, headers, attachments)
[NO]  → RETURN WP_Error('email_failed', 'The email could not be sent...')
ACTION: compose $err_message with human_time_diff($last_sent) and human_time_diff($last_sent + $rate_limit)

flow: [YES] → get_plugin($extension) → $plugin; use $plugin['Name'] or $extension['slug'] as fallback; format cause message
[NO (theme)] → wp_get_theme($extension['slug']); use theme->display('Name') or slug; format cause message
require_once plugin.php if get_plugins() not loaded
Fallback: iterate $plugins for file starting with slug/
RETURN plugin data array or false
RETURN assoc array: [wp, theme, plugin (optional), php]
DECISION: RECOVERY_MODE_EMAIL constant defined AND is valid email?

wp_filters_hooks: recovery_mode_email — filters full email array (to, subject, message, headers, attachments)
key_decisions: Rate limit check: no previous send OR time elapsed > rate_limit seconds
Storage error guard: option update must succeed before sending email
Extension type branch: 'plugin' vs 'theme' for cause message
Locale switch: only if switch_to_locale() function + global $wp_locale_switcher exist
Email address source: RECOVERY_MODE_EMAIL constant overrides admin_email option
return_values: WP_Error('storage_error') — could not persist rate-limit timestamp
WP_Error('email_sent_already') — rate limit still in effect
important_notes: Class is final (not extendable). Rate limit stored as Unix timestamp in DB option. Email subject includes site name. Message placeholders replaced via str_replace. Recovery URL generated by injected WP_Recovery_Mode_Link_Service. Debug info always includes WP version, active theme, PHP version; plugin entry only when extension provided.
